description: The Port of Southampton is proposing a new experimental Traffic Separation Scheme (TSS). Visualize this proposal in the simulator by creating a new scenario at /opt/bridgecommand/Scenarios/z) Experimental TSS/ using the coordinates provided in the surveyor's memo at /home/ga/Documents/Hydrography/TSS_Proposal_Memo.txt. The scenario must be configured for the 'Solent' environment during daytime with clear weather, including your own ship at a safe viewing distance (approximately 50.79, -1.29) and exactly 6 static buoy targets at the converted decimal degree coordinates (accurate to at least 4 decimal places) derived from the memo.
